chunks.text: Analog Generators for SerDes Clock Generation and Distribution (EECS-2023-36) by Zhongkai Wang and Elad Alon. Human Intranet: Connecting Wearable and Implantable Devices (EECS-2021-221) by Ali Moin, Jan M. Rabaey and Elad Alon. An Open, Scalable Massive MIMO Testbed Operating at E-Band Frequencies (EECS-2020-194) by James Dunn.
chunks.question: What are the titles and authors of the three most recent technical reports?
chunks.answer: Analog Generators, Human Intranet, Massive MIMO Testbed.

chunks.text: Scalable RF Receivers for Large Antenna Arrays (EECS-2020-188) by Konstantin Trotskovsky. Neuromodulation IC for System Integration and Self-Interference Cancellation (EECS-2019-157) by Seobin Jung. System Architecture and Signal Processing Techniques for Massive Multi-user Antenna Arrays (EECS-2019-149) by Antonio Puglielli, Borivoje Nikolic and Elad Alon.
chunks.question: Which reports focus on antenna arrays and neuromodulation?
chunks.answer: Scalable RF Receivers and Neuromodulation IC.

chunks.text: OMNI: A Distributed, Modular, Closed-Loop Neuromodulation Device for the Treatment of Neuropsychiatric Disorders (EECS-2017-178) by Ali Moin, Jan M. Rabaey and Elad Alon. An Integrated Multilevel Converter with Sigma Delta Control for LED Lighting (EECS-2017-73) by Daniel Gerber. RF Transmitter Design for Large Array Applications (EECS-2017-11) by Pengpeng Lu and Elad Alon.
chunks.question: What devices are described in the 2017 technical reports?
chunks.answer: OMNI neuromodulation device and LED converter.

chunks.text: Next Generation Memory Interfaces (EECS-2015-111) by Miron Veryanskiy, Kyle Dillon, Kalika Saxena, Sinan Liu and Chenyang Xu. Design of Multi-Gb/s Multi-Coefficient Mixed-Signal Equalizers (EECS-2014-189) by Chintan Thakkar and Elad Alon. Design of a system for cm-range wireless communication (EECS-2009-184) by Simone Gambini, Jan M. Rabaey and Elad Alon.
chunks.question: What are the topics of the reports from 2015, 2014, and 2009?
chunks.answer: Memory interfaces, mixed-signal equalizers, wireless communication.

chunks.text: NEM Relay Memory Design (EECS-2009-83) by Abhinav Gupta and Elad Alon.
chunks.question: What is the oldest report listed and who are the authors?
chunks.answer: NEM Relay Memory Design by Gupta and Alon.
